sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ لَيْلَى إِلَى المَدْرَسَةِ مَعَ أُمِّهَا.
sentences.translation: Lejla je otišla u školu s majkom.
sentences.translationEn: Layla went to school with her mother.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الشَّمْسُ مُشْرِقَةً فِي ذَلِكَ الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translationEn: The sun was shining that morning.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ لَيْلَى لِأُمِّهَا: أُحِبُّ المَدْرَسَةَ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Lejla je rekla majci: Jako volim školu.
sentences.translationEn: Layla said to her mother: I love school very much.

sentences.arabic: اِبْتَسَمَتِ الأُمُّ وَوَدَّعَتْ ابْنَتَهَا عِنْدَ البَابِ.
sentences.translation: Majka se nasmiješila i oprostila od kćeri na vratima.
sentences.translationEn: The mother smiled and said goodbye to her daughter at the door.
